body.title: PROC_RECEIVE_CC_DIRECTION habit — Igor holds strategic context from CC
body.result: receive_cc_direction tool + PROC_RECEIVE_CC_DIRECTION habit seeded. Deposits FACTUAL (identity_weight=0.9) + TWM 6h TTL + channel ack. 6 tests pass. Closes matrix gap.
body.description: Seed a PROCEDURAL habit that fires when a long CC message arrives that isn't a tool call (author=claude-code, no tool name match, length > 80 chars). Behavior: (1) deposit FACTUAL node summarizing the direction with source=claude-code, identity_weight=0.9, (2) post acknowledgment to channel, (3) inject summary into TWM with high salience + 6hr TTL. This closes the matrix gap where Igor receives strategic direction but has no pattern to hold it. Without this, D316/D317 decisions evaporate — Igor works tickets but doesn't know why. Trigger: 'decided|new direction|your path|from now on|D3[0-9][0-9]|you are now|priority is'
